prompt: Build a complete notification system with real-time WebSocket events, email digests, and in-app notification center --team

assertions.name: team-flag-detected
assertions.description: Recognizes --team flag and sets mode to team

assertions.name: spec-plan-team-arg
assertions.description: Passes --team flag through to spec-plan invocation

assertions.name: correct-step-order
assertions.description: Still follows the 5-step sequence even in team mode
